error_signature: there is another trigger running on the same app
title: WhatsApp trigger conflict due to existing webhook
symptom: The WhatsApp API returns an error stating that there is another trigger running on the same app, preventing the workflow from executing properly.
applies_when: Only one workflow exists in n8n
not_this_if: Error does not mention existing triggers
root_cause: n8n does not automatically delete webhooks when a trigger is removed or a new app is created. This can lead to conflicts if the old webhook still exists and is active.
fix_steps: Run an HTTP node with the provided cURL command to retrieve the active webhook.
Use the retrieved information to send another HTTP request to delete the existing webhook.
Create a new WhatsApp trigger in n8n.
agent_instruction: Delete the existing WhatsApp webhook using the HTTP node and then create a new trigger.
